name: Shiitke and Porcini Posole
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Hot Meat Broth (pork, beef, chicken, duck or a combination)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mushrooms and hot broth in a saucepan.
2. Cover and let sit until softened, 15-20 minutes.
3. When the mushrooms are soft, add the hominy and salsa to taste.
4. Simmer for 15-25 minutes, or until the flavors are melded.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve immediately, either as is or ladled over a slab of Jack cheese.
Per serving: 130 calories, 8 g protein, 26 g carbohydrate, 4 mg sodium, 4 g fiber, no fat, no cholesterol.
